Design system  /  Components  /  Setup steps
SetupSteps + SetupStep · vertical inline-row pattern for docs setup/install/walkthrough sections

Setup

Numbered steps you read top to bottom. Use this for setup, install, and onboarding flows where each step is a single action with one short paragraph of context.

1
Add an xWiki source in OpenConnector

Open Integrations → Sources → New source, choose xWiki, paste the base URL and an API token. Test the connection.

2
Pick the spaces to index

Per source, choose one or more xWiki spaces. Open Register indexes the articles in those spaces and refreshes on the configured cron schedule.

3
Enable the integration in the consuming app

In the target app (DeskDesk, OpenCatalogi, etc.), open the Integrations tab, toggle xWiki articles on, pick the source you added above.

4
Verify

Open the app's chat sidebar, ask a question that matches an indexed article. The matching article appears in the answer with a deep-link back to xWiki.

React / MDX usage

Mount in MDX as <SetupSteps/> + <SetupStep/>

Vertical numbered-step list for docs setup/install/walkthrough sections. Each step shows a small orange hex with its number on the left and a bold title + one short paragraph on the right. Distinct from HowSteps, which is a 3-up card row for marketing surfaces; SetupSteps is meant for in-body docs prose where steps are sequential and detailed.

Import & example

import {SetupSteps, SetupStep} from '@conduction/docusaurus-preset/components';

## Setup

<SetupSteps>
  <SetupStep title="Add an xWiki source in OpenConnector">
    Open *Integrations → Sources → New source*, choose *xWiki*, paste the base URL and an API token. Test the connection.
  </SetupStep>
  <SetupStep title="Pick the spaces to index">
    Per source, choose one or more xWiki spaces. Open Register indexes the articles and refreshes on the configured cron schedule.
  </SetupStep>
  <SetupStep title="Verify">
    Open the app's chat sidebar, ask a question that matches an indexed article.
  </SetupStep>
</SetupSteps>

Props

  • title optional h2 above the list (e.g. Setup, Install); pass title={null} to drop the heading when the section already has one
  • lede optional one-paragraph intro
  • start starting number for the first step (default 1; useful when the list resumes after a break)
  • children one or more <SetupStep/> nodes

SetupStep takes title (bold text on the first line) and children (the body paragraph; MDX inline markup allowed). The step number is auto-assigned in document order; no manual numbering.
